title: roupellina boivinii var. angustifolia
intro: Roupellina boivinii var. angustifolia, also known as the African walnut or bitter walnut, is a plant species in the family Capparaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Roupellina boivinii var. angustifolia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in traditional herbal remedies.
